canonical_name: Peasant Self-Defenders of Córdoba and Urabá
aliases: Autodefensas Campesinas de Córdoba y Urabá
description: Colombian paramilitary group founded by the Castaño brothers in northwestern Colombia to retaliate against FARC-EP. It operated mainly in Antioquia and Córdoba departments, protecting members' farms and drug interests while eliminating left-wing sympathizers. It later became the core of the United Self-Defenders of Colombia (AUC).
